title: Define Types of Tree Items
text: Define Types of Tree Items Define tree item types that determine the role of tree items, and specify the icons that are used to represent these tree items at run time. Note: Each tree item type is stored as an associative list of properties. For more information about setting these properties in ProcScript, see Type .
